file_name: WIN Network - NBN Enterprises and Television Holdings Darwin - Third party questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if WIN TV and either NBN or NTD are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with WIN TV and/or NBN or NTD.

For consumers (current NBN or NTD viewers) – do you consider that the content offering available in your area may change in comparison to current offerings? Will any change be due to less competition?

subpoints.text: If there was an increase in the price of advertising on WIN TV, would you switch to alternative advertising options?
If the proposed acquisition proceeds, will there be an impact on your ability to negotiate arrangements for advertising opportunities?

questions.text: For advertisers who currently advertise through NBN or NTD:
